zh.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian是William Trian - Lord of Oxenden和Joan Pantulf的女兒，於1190年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾。她於1203年與Robert Neville of Scotton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1253年在英國林可爾史爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian是William Trian - Lord of Oxenden和Joan Pantulf的女儿，于1190年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾。她于1203年与Robert Neville of Scotton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1253年在英国林可爾史爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Domenica, Gaetano, Pasquale, Rocco.
Italian (Basilicata): possibly a habitational name from a lost or unidentified minor place. This surname is very rare in Italy. Compare   Triana  .
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from Triano, a place in Biscay, Basque Country. Alternatively, a variant of   Triana  .

variants.name: Triana
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Armando, Jorge, Rafael, Juan, Pedro, Francisco, Alberto, Ana, Carlos, Humberto, Miguel.  Italian Antonio, Lorenzo, Marco, Cosimo, Cosmo, Filiberto, Giovanni, Sal.
Spanish and Galician: habitational name from any of the places so called in Galicia, Málaga, and Tenerife, in particular a suburb of Seville.
Probably an altered form of Italian   Triano  .

nameMeanings.name: Eustache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian was born in 1190, in Gloucestershire, England as the daughter of William Trian - Lord of Oxenden and Joan Pantulf. She married Robert Neville of Scotton in 1203. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1253, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian est née en 1190, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fille de William Trian - Lord of Oxenden et Joan Pantulf. Elle a épousé Robert Neville of Scotton en 1203. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1253, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian wurde 1190 in Gloucestershire, England, als Tochter von William Trian - Lord of Oxenden und Joan Pantulf geboren. Sie hat 1203 Robert Neville of Scotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1253 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian è nata il nel 1190 nel Gloucestershire, England come figlia di William Trian - Lord of Oxenden e Joan Pantulf. Lei sposato Robert Neville of Scotton nel 1203. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1253, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trianは1190年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでWilliam Trian - Lord of OxendenとJoan Pantulfの娘として生まれた。1203年にRobert Neville of Scottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1253年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian(은)는 1190년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 William Trian - Lord of Oxenden(와)과 Joan Pantulf의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1203년 Robert Neville of Scotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 영국 링코실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Brampton, Lincolnshire, England: Brampton, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian nasceu em 1190, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filha de William Trian - Lord of Oxenden e Joan Pantulf. Ela casou-se com Robert Neville of Scotton em 1203. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1253, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian родилась в 1190 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали William Trian - Lord of Oxenden и Joan Pantulf. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Neville of Scotton в 1203 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1253 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eustache de Trian nació en 1190, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hija de William Trian - Lord of Oxenden y Joan Pantulf. Se casó con Robert Neville of Scotton en 1203. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1253, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
